title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 386.160 - Payment of salaries and expenses
text:
386.160.  Payment of salaries and expenses. — All salaries and expenses of the commission shall be audited and allowed by the commissioner of administration and paid by the state treasurer upon warrants out of the funds provided therefor.
(RSMo 1939 § 5591, A. 1949 H.B. 2099, A.L. 1980 H.B. 1266) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5135; 1919 § 10424
